Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production , And For Production Of Documents And For; Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John J. Hughes plaintiff and moving party: Randall Coard
Jared A. Washkowitz defendant and opposing party: Norwegian Cruise Line
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents.
The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted in part.
Form interrogatories 12.4 Granted. Defendant is ordered to serve a verified supplemental response within 10 days of notice of this order.
special interrogatories 2-5, 7, 8 Granted.
The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 10 days of notice of this order.
6 Granted.
Request for production
Granted.
The Court finds that defendant asserted unmeritorius objections to plaintiff's interrogatories.
MODIFICATION: That Plaintiff waived sanctions. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
